title.part2: for those who deserve to be amazed.

hero.subtitle: Every card is meticulously handcrafted by an artist — made exclusively for you and your loved one. No printing, just authentic materials and genuine care.

title.part1: A real greeting isn't something you just pick off a shelf. It’s your words, your photos, and the name of someone you love—
title.part2: brought to life by a master craftsman in just 20 to 60 minutes.

promoCards.cta: Add your text, name, date, and photo to make it truly yours.

stats.title: How It Works
stats.subtitle: Crafted by hand, every single day. See the magic for yourself.

customers.name: Janis
customers.text: This card has so much soul. It feels like something a best friend would make just for you. A true work of art.

customers.name: Andrejs
customers.text: An anniversary gift for my wife. The creator added extra details that I didn't expect—it was stunning and truly unexpected.

customers.name: Linda
customers.text: Finally, a card that feels like a real gift, not just a print. Thank you for such quality.

cta.title: Create Your Card Right Now
cta.description: Keep it simple. Choose a design, add your words and photos. Let our creator do the rest.

newsletter.title: Unique Designs & Stories
newsletter.description: Sign up for updates. Get news on latest designs, sales, and inspiring gifting stories from our community.
newsletter.privacy_policy: By clicking the button, you agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.

time.question: How long to craft a card?
time.answer: It takes twenty minutes to prepare a standard card and forty for a personalized one, since every piece is made by hand. If we’re extra busy, your card might wait its turn in line, but the high quality remains our top priority.

shipping.question: How do I send it to a recipient?
shipping.answer: Cards travel straight to your recipient’s door. Simply select your preferred shipping method at checkout. We provide tracking and insurance for every order. Should anything get lost, we’ll craft a new one at no extra cost.

satisfaction.question: What if I don't like the card
satisfaction.answer: We offer free redos. If you're unhappy with the result, our master will craft a fresh version for you. This policy is always in effect, except in cases of fraud or where no proof of the issue is provided.

photos.question: What kind of photos can I upload?
photos.answer: JPG or PNG up to 30MB. You must confirm that you own the photo or have the rights to use it. The system will automatically verify the file size and format.

designs.question: How many design options are there?
designs.answer: There are three options to choose from. If none of them fit, you can generate three more. They will be added to the list so you can pick the best one.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.subtitle: Get in touch with us, and we'll get back to you.

newsletter.title: Stay updated on new designs and offers.
newsletter.disclaimer: By subscribing, you agree to our Privacy Policy and consent to receive updates.
